description_long: This is a modern main battle tank with a low-profile, angular hull and turret, designed for urban and battlefield environments. The vehicle features a long, prominent main cannon mounted on a rotating turret, with additional equipment such as a machine gun and observation devices on the turret roof. The hull is covered in dark, sloped armor plating with visible hatches, storage boxes, and reinforced side skirts protecting the suspension and tracks. The tank rides on a set of large, road wheels and continuous tracks, providing high mobility over rough terrain. Distinctive markings, including numbers and insignia, are visible on the turret and hull, and the vehicle is finished in a dark, multi-tone camouflage pattern. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and urban combat survivability.
description: A heavily armored, dark-camouflaged main battle tank with a long cannon, sloped armor, and visible military markings. Features include a rotating turret, side skirts, and robust tracks for urban and battlefield use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped glacis plate, main cannon, and turret details, with visible hatches and armor thickness.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the cannon, side skirts, road wheels, and turret-mounted equipment.
description_view_2: Rear view of the turret and cannon, showing the back armor, exhausts, and additional storage compartments.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the tracks, side armor, and turret features, including the machine gun and observation devices.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon mounted on the turret front, one machine gun mount on the turret roof, and possible secondary mounts for observation or smoke launchers.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the hull and turret, reinforced side skirts, and additional modular panels on the turret and hull sides.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Dark multi-tone camouflage with angular, geometric shapes in dark gray, black, and brown.
attribute_military_markings: White numbers and insignia on the turret and hull sides, including a circular emblem and alphanumeric codes.
